title: lichen_dev_iface_init is a one-line wrapper that could be inlined
description:
lichen_l2.c lines 314-317: static void lichen_dev_iface_init(iface) { lichen_l2_iface_init(iface); }. This wrapper exists to match the net_if_api.init signature. Technically could pass lichen_l2_iface_init directly to the struct initializer since signatures match.

Rewrite: .init = lichen_l2_iface_init, (assuming lichen_l2_iface_init signature matches net_if_api.init)
close_reason: API compatibility: wrapper exists to match NET_L2_INIT signature requirements; inlining would require macro changes
